message:
feat(catalog): add quality signals to extension catalog (bd-2uh1.5)

Add QualitySignals schema definition and populate quality_signals for all
223 extensions based on conformance results and category taxonomy.

- conformance_grade: A (187 pass), B (22 manifest mismatch), C (9 npm/dep),
  F (4 runtime error), untested (1 fixture)
- compatibility_score: green (162), yellow (47 pkg-with-deps or minor),
  red (14 can't load)
- maintenance_status: derived from source tier
- category_tags: mapped from extension-collections.json taxonomy (75 tagged)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
